---
title: "ChargePool is now featured on my Founder page"
date: 2026-04-23
---



:::{.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}


I’ve added [**ChargePool**](https://www.chargepool.io/) to the new [**Founder & Entrepreneurial Initiatives**](../founder.html) page on my website.

ChargePool reflects my interest in energy systems, pricing design, and uncertainty-aware product thinking. The broader idea is to contribute to a cleaner and more seamless EV charging experience, while grounding the platform in rigour, structure, and trust.

The public project page is still under construction, but the core direction is already visible on the site.
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
![](../img/cp.png){width="75%" fig-align="center"}
:::
:::
